content:
📌 Version 7.7 – Finalizing Archetype Mechanics, Environmental Interactions, Resurrection Costs, Combat & Factions, and Absentee Consequences


🚀 This iteration finalizes archetype balancing, elemental interactions, resurrection exchanges, faction-based conflict, and the disappearing student mechanic.

📜 1. Archetype Mechanics – Buffs, Debuffs, Abilities, & Role in Narrative

📜 Each archetype now has a fixed starting state that includes:
✔ A Permanent Buff & Debuff (Archetype-Specific)
✔ Three Unique Abilities (Unlocked at Different XP Levels)
✔ A Fixed Dice Set for Rolling in Skill Checks & Combat
✔ An Elemental Charge that Affects How They Interact with the Environment
✔ Interactions with Other Archetypes, Items, and Weekly Story Settings
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 448 (chunk 448/555)
